items.name: hyperframes-fix
items.description: HyperFrames-fix 一键生成可上传有流量视频 。目的是让 HyperFrames 生成视频适应国内需求，1 流畅的中文语音， 2 中文短视频样式新增， 3 优化整个生成视频流程。 基本上现在一键就可以完成横版竖版的快节奏短视频，例如随便丢给一个文章，一个doc，就能够制作视频！ 太棒！

items.name: keyflow
items.description: KeyFlow is a professional typing tutor for software engineers that prioritizes programming syntax and IDE shortcuts over standard prose. By fetching real-time snippets via the GitHub API, it provides an authentic practice environment using production code from top-tier repositories.
